## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and AI-driven search trends.](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 6 articles uploaded, more coming today/tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [New Looker performance report built for tracking content metrics](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity) becoming increasingly important for developer-centric products](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Key AI-SEO factors: brand mentions, quotes, infographics for authority signals](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [6 of this week's articles uploaded, bulk to be completed today](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [New topic suggestions shared in chat for next week](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Request: Share published URLs in Slack or mark as published in Content OS for easier tracking](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

### SEO and Backlinking Strategy

  - [Focus on creating more stats/data-heavy pages for backlink attraction](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Example: Short-form video stats article gained 40 high-authority backlinks in 1-2 months](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Suggestion to create a content cluster in the OS for brainstorming data-heavy topics](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Indexing process working well, with quick turnaround on most recent submissions](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

### Performance Tracking

  - [New Looker performance report created for better content metrics visibility](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Some pages showing impressions but no clicks yet; normal for new content](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Slight week-over-week dip in clicks, but increase in sessions (likely due to Google core update)](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### AI Search Optimization Insights

  - [Two main ways to get cited by AI: during model training and through online queries](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
  - [Training data sources: CommonCrawl (Reddit), Bing, and other web crawls](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Online queries (e.g., ChatGPT browsing, Perplexity) mostly powered by Bing](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - ["Index Now" API can help with faster content indexing across non-Google search engines](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)

### AI-Driven Content Strategies

  - [Brand mentions becoming more important than traditional backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Incorporate quotes from authoritative sources or influencers in articles](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Create infographics and data visualizations to boost content authority](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Adrian exploring AI SEO tools: SEMRUSH AI toolkit, ScrunchAI for prompt monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update content workflow to incorporate more quotations and authoritative sources](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)
  - [Explore creation of original infographics and data visualizations for content](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Adrian to share findings from AI SEO tools (SEMRUSH, ScrunchAI) in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Plan for a content refresh cycle in 1-2 months based on AI ranking insights](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance through new Looker report and adjust strategy as needed](https://fathom.video/share/TXnP3A9s1msesKCAs-ZesWgijm752q_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
